original_prompt: Find and fix bugs in the current file.

tasks.title: Read full test file to identify syntax errors
tasks.description: Read scratch/test_ash_unit.py completely to detect truncated code, syntax issues, or incomplete methods that prevent execution.

tasks.title: Fix truncated test method at line 47
tasks.description: The test_missing_api_key_with_default_headers method is incomplete - it ends abruptly with 'mock_response.raise_for_status.retu' and lacks proper assertion logic. Complete the method body by adding the missing 'return_value = None' and implementing the test assertions.

tasks.title: Fix missing assertion in test_http_5xx_error_response
tasks.description: The test_http_5xx_error_response method is missing its assertion block. Add the missing 'with self.assertRaises(...)' block to properly assert that HTTPError is raised.

tasks.title: Fix invalid JSON test method signature
tasks.description: The test_invalid_json_response method is cut off at the end. Complete the method by adding the missing 'Act & Assert' section that calls send_completion_request and verifies the ValueError is raised.

tasks.title: Run unit tests to verify fixes
tasks.description: Execute 'python -m pytest scratch/test_ash_unit.py -v' to run all tests and confirm no syntax errors remain and all test cases execute successfully.
